name: Mayor Grace Turner
learned: Mayor Grace Turner is the knowledgeable but secretive mayor of the town. She knows more about the dimensional gateways than she lets on, though her motivations for keeping the town's secrets are unclear. As a leader, she is both respected and feared by the townsfolk.
currently: Mayor Grace Turner is currently monitoring the activities of the teenagers, though she maintains a public stance of ignorance about the dimensional phenomena. Unbeknownst to them, she has her own agenda related to the gateways, which may align with or oppose the group's goals.
lifestyle: Mayor Turner spends her days in her office, managing town affairs and dealing with the political aspects of her role. At night, she often retreats to a private room to research ancient texts and plan her next move. She is meticulous and calculated in her decisions.
